name: twofi
title: twofi

commands.name: twofi

arguments.description: include the count with the words
arguments.raw: --count, -c: include the count with the words

arguments.description: a file containing a list of terms
arguments.raw: --term_file, -T <file>: a file containing a list of terms

arguments.description: a file containing a list of users
arguments.raw: --user_file, -U <file>: a file containing a list of users

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# twofi -h
 twoif 2.0-beta Robin Wood (robin@digininja.org) (www.digininja.org)
 twoif - Twitter Words of Interest
 
 Usage: twoif [OPTIONS]
 	--help, -h: show help
 	--config <file>: config file, default is twofi.yml
 	--count, -c: include the count with the words
 	--min_word_length, -m: minimum word length
 	--term_file, -T <file>: a file containing a list of terms
 	--terms, -t: comma separated search terms
 		quote words containing spaces, no space after commas
 	--user_file, -U <file>: a file containing a list of users
 	--users, -u: comma separated usernames
 		quote words containing spaces, no space after commas
 	--verbose, -v: verbose

apt_metadata.description:
Twitter words of interest
When attempting to crack passwords custom word lists are
very useful additions to standard dictionaries. An
interesting idea originally released on the "7 Habits of
Highly Effective Hackers" blog was to use Twitter to help
generate those lists based on searches for keywords related
to the list that is being cracked. I've expanded this idea
into twofi which will take multiple search terms and return
a word list sorted by most common first.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use twofi because ### twofi.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `twoif [OPTIONS]` as documented upstream for twofi.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair twofi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `twofi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### twofi.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install twofi
